reviews_data.review_text: Good but a lot of boba pearls

My local boba place closed so I went here on a whim and had a great experience. The staff was friendly, our drinks were made quickly, and the boba was still warm. Going to be my go-to boba spot from now on.

I had the pleasure of trying milk cha-cha today their customer service was excellent !! I love that  they make their Thai tea with real tea leaves! I ordered an iced thai tea with brown sugar boba and a milk foam topping it was a 10/10✨

Female Employee who frequently visits Virginia had an attitude & was extremely rude. there was plenty of customers and it disgusted her to give me the bathroom key up until point of purchase. Additionally Items fell off the display shelf & the first person she looked at was me. I wonder Why ! The kids standing directly next to the display shelf knocked it over. Giving my order was an issue & I ordered one item. This is the same item that I order all the time & it was not made correctly. I am a frequent customer & usually the guys give good service. Great service is important especially with the price of their beverages. What I also found distasteful is that she compared Milk Cha-Cha to Starbucks which is not a good look. All I ask going forward is for good service and appreciate your customers, especially the ones who are regulars.

Wonderful experience! Employees and owner are very kind, helpful, and efficient. My drink was made very quickly, and it was absolutely delicious. Definitely worth the price, and cheaper than I usually pay!
First time trying the boba tea, Love it! Tastes, yummy, organic and fresh. The workers were very welcoming and kind, Highly recommended 10/10 !
I come here every Sunday with my boyfriend. We love it!

am so glad I stopped by Milk Cha-cha! It is definitely the best spot for boba/bubble tea in Rock Hill. I ordered the mango boba tea and it was perfect—the sweetness level was just right and the boba pearls were perfectly chewy. The staff was friendly and the shop has a great vibe. Highly recommended.
I got a strawberry matcha and it was delicious
Very good and very clean! Love the staff every time I'm there <3
Best Boba Tea in Rock Hill.
Delicious boba everyime! Took my daughter here for a special treat on her birthday because she loves it so much!
Great boba!
Awesome strawberry matcha latte!! Great customer service! I will go back again!
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️We’ve been coming here for months! It’s our absolute favorite, and everything is always fresh and freshly made! 10 stars! Highly recommend!

First the atmosphere. You can't beat a greeting from genuinely friendly people. They never seemed to tire from my endless questions. Always patient they never missed on their suggestions. The drinks here look like art work and I've tried many. While I probably wouldn't order some again there was never an issue with quality. They have plenty of teas I could endorse no problem.  Drink the Vietnamese coffee of you want to ditch a certain coffe shop. I make the excuse of bringing my son so I can go twice a day sometimes. I'm so glad they are here to offer something different and delicious. Do yourself a favor and give them a try. If you're not sure what to order they are more than happy to help. I would give 100 stars if possible!!!!

I recently visited this boba shop from out of town and was blown away by how consistent it was. I personally loved their HK milk tea, but if you’re into fruit teas, classic milk teas, there’s something for everyone. They also have options for how sweet you like your drinks. What really sets this place apart is their amazing boba - it was perfectly chewy and surprisingly fresh. Overall, it’s definitely worth a stop if you’re in the area. You can tell they take great pride in their drinks, and the flavor and quality are top notch!

Really good! I always go here for boba. It's my favorite in the Charlotte area. Really tasty, good price especially compared to something like Starbucks. Friendly staff and really clean inside.they also have a good loyalty reward system.
boba is good with good selection
Very cozy and delicious I do recommend. The shop is small but it adds to the vibe. Very fast service and plenty of seating. The employees are very kind and have a very large selection of drinks.
I was so happy to discover Milk Cha Cha as a local place to get Boba tea. The Brown Sugar Mill Swirl is to die for! I highly recommend checking them out.
Love
The darjeeling milk tea, is my usual go to, when I need a caffeine kick, but the new café latte feel more appropriate now that it's fall.
The Thai tea has been amazing every time I’ve visited, strawberry yakult was nice and refreshing as well. Staff is friendly and inviting and the store was very clean.
I’ve been coming here for about 2 years and I still can’t get enough of the drinks! I recommend this place to everyone!!
This drink is so fire 🔥
Hands-down the best boba place I’ve ever been to! Service is wonderful. Drinks are amazing! They’re always so kind to answer all my questions and the drinks never disappoint!
Our favorite place for a boba!!
Kevin was super friendly and helpful. I had never had Boba before and the drink I got was amazing! I will definitely be back!
I love thisszz

I love love LOVE this place.  There aren’t a lot of Boba tea places near me, and there’s even fewer that have rose milk tea. They have rose milk tea! It is my absolute favorite. The people there are very kind and I’ve never had a bad experience. This is my go to for my milk tea.
I love going to this place they are very friendly and the drinks are amazing I just love it and recommend it

DON’T FORGET YOUR TYPE OF MILK!!! I loved this place and visit when I’m in the area b/c I don’t live close. Today I forgot to mention I prefer almond milk b/c the girl asked regular sweetness, ice, and everything okay. (NOTHING ABOUT MILK OPTIONS!) I didn’t think about the milk portion and I prefer Almond Milk. They would not change my drink and told me I could pay for another one.  So disappointing!!! Tried to give it to hubby, he didn’t like it so my drink ended in the trash :(
The absolute best tea ever!
Delicious boba and drinks with great workers!
So glad that Milk Cha-Cha is in Rock Hill. Absolutely the best Boba tea place I've been to. The staff is always friendly and quick.
Love love loveee this place 💯 they always treat me and my friends right 🙂‍↕️ the mango with strawberry popping boba is my go to but everything I've had here has been sooooo yummy
I love this place! I've been coming about once a week since they opened and I've never had a bad experience. Drinks are always great and so are the workers :)

I tried other milk teas before, never satisfied my taste. I found milk cha cha. I've been going to milk cha cha at least 2 times a week. I can't never decide which flavor, so I get different flavors each time. Their brown sugar Bubba is always soft. I highly recommend milk cha cha.
YUMMMMM!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi TPT,
Thank you for taking the time to leave us a review. After reviewing our cameras, our admins verified that the situation was handled in line with our policies. You ordered a Hong Kong milk tea with no sugar and no ice. Our recipe remains the same for every order; the only adjustments in your case were the sugar and ice levels you selected. Because we brew with real, authentic tea leaves, the flavor can taste naturally more bitter without sugar or ice.
Our team offered to add those items back in, but you declined and instead requested a different drink. As noted at the bottom of our menu, all sales are final. This policy helps us keep prices fair and consistent, especially as a small business navigating today’s economy. If we were to remake drinks freely, we would unfortunately need to increase our prices for everyone.
We understand our policies may not match every expectation, and we’re sorry this experience didn’t meet yours. We truly appreciate your feedback and hope you’ll give us another chance in the future.
reviews_data.review_text: Once my favorite place for milk tea but all it took was one bad customer service experience - the tea was wayyy bitter but they were unwilling to change it! I can tell even from the color - it’s way too dark compared to the normal one and compared to their own advertised picture or the drink! Bad order can happened once in a while but bad customer service is inexcusable!! It could have been easily re-made instead of ‘we don’t do that here’

Best Boba 🧋 in town! Rock Hill needed this! Chris and Ashley get our order right every time and service is top notch! Our favorite drinks are Hong Kong milk tea add pudding, Jazmine green milk tea, and brown sugar milk swirl!
𝙸𝚝'𝚜 𝚜𝚘𝚘 𝚐𝚘𝚘𝚍 𝙸 𝚍𝚎𝚏𝚒𝚗𝚒𝚝𝚎𝚕𝚢 𝚛𝚎𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚖𝚎𝚗𝚍
No words to describe it’s amazing! So very nice and so cute and so yummy😋%100 recommend.

El sabor de té thai con boba es muy delicioso.
Primera vez que voy a este lugar y quede muy satisfecha. Excelente lugar y atención. Han ganado un cliente más.

So yummy!! I’ve been here a few times and try something different each time, and every time it’s so good! This time I got an Ube Milk Tea with boba (75% sweet) and it was perfect! Thank you Milk Cha Cha!

Amazing boba place, great spot to take your lovely girl/boyfriend

Comfy cozy vibe with a good atmosphere and great smell

Oreo slush is amazing, basically tastes like an Oreo but liquid, if you like oreos you'll like this

Brown sugar tastes exceptional and rich, boba is cooked and easy to chew, amazing

Girlfriend loved the signature milk tea, took a tip myself and it was amazing, definitely one of the better milk teas ive had

Come and have a great drink and a good chat with your date, would recommend
-Kevin/Chloe 10/10 7/16/2025
The kids and I all love their teas, slushes, and lattes! friendly staff, great prices, excellent variety!
Love the place. Great boba

Chris the chaiser was rude and felt very rushed to order my children's drinks. One of my girls accidentally dropped her purchased jelly stick and he was like I can't do anything about that and turned his back on us. He could've offered half off on another purchase or something. Terrible customer service!

I appreciate the actual accuracy of sweetness percentages. Most boba places aren't sincere with the sugar levels but this location does. When I'm ask for 25% it actually taste right. This is important for insulin sensitive customers. Not all the drinks can be modified but many of them are.
Come and try their drink ❤️
So good!! 10/10 😋😋very yummy!!
Went with my son. I got the Strawberry tea and he had the Thai tea. Wish I had thought to get pictures. They were both delicious!!!

Amazing drinks! Had some drinks I was looking for that other boba places didn't have, like the strawberry Macha Latte. The staff were so friendly and were happy to give their advice on what drinks I may like!
The customer service was wonderful and one of the people at the register was very helpful for my first time there on what I try! Great selection of drinks and lovely atmosphere.
Best boba tea in town. My daughter's favorite place for a treat.
This place is amazing and I love their boba. It's so good!

My new favorite milk tea spot. I had the brown sugar milk tea which is my favorite and they did not disappoint. It was so yummy. I usually have to drive out to Pineville, NC or take the opportunity while I'm out there for something else to enjoy this tea but now I no longer have to take that long drive or wait to enjoy my favorite drink.
sooooo yummy
Super good place! The lady who work there is super sweet!

I order a drink tasted disgusting wanted to see if they got any other flavors but they said they don’t do NO REFUND nor REMAKE ANY DRINK and that I would have to pay for another drink OUT OF POCKET if I want another one worse boba place
Recommended place, friendly and super fast people and the Oreo slush is delicious. 🥰
Impeccable service. Money well spent. The menu is amazing.
This place have the best boba and it tastes good
Great place
Some of the best boba I've ever had, I can't stop coming back
Amazing.  Bigger sizes and lower prices than other places.  But it is also better tasting

Love Milk Cha Cha! So glad they opened up a new location right near home instead of driving all the way to Charlotte. It’s at a great location located in the plaza with ample parking for the whole family.

You can’t go wrong getting anything here so much so I usually just let the bobarista pick out whatever they recommend and we are always satisfied with my drinks. Definitely try them out. They have plenty of selections from fruity teas to creamy milk teas. They have tons of toppings like fruit jellies, popping boba and regular boba for you to customize everything to your liking.

The service is always so quick and nice! I barely sit down and the drinks are done. So amazing!

The interior is so clean and always organized. It’s the perfect place to sit, relax, and chat while enjoying a sweet treat. I love bringing friends and family here.
Very good and fast service, the boba tea tasted amazing! I loved that there were games available for guests to play while enjoying their drinks, beautiful place I look forward to visiting often!
If you like citrus you will love the grapefruit refresher my recommendation for citrus lovers is the fresh grapefruit yakult 25 or more sweetness it’s amazing
My favorite Bobba place!!!

I had the brown sugar milk swirl and it was delicious! The owners were so kind and pleasant. We are just visiting the area from Ohio for a short New Year's trip, but we will have to come back here-it's that good! Happy 2025 everyone! 🥳
This cute little boba shop's tea is very authentic. The tapioca was nice and fresh and the lady that took our order was so kind. Highly recommend!!
Very good service and kind workers👍
Great place and amazing drinks. Large selection of drinks.  Probiotic drinks and super Healthy and delicious.
Very friendly atmosphere, reasonably priced drinks, and the owners were very nice. First time trying their boba was by chance as I was running errands, 10/10
Such a cute boba tea spot with the nicest owners. They insisted on spelling our names correctly. So good and so fast

They have lots of DF dairy free options.

You can do hot or cold drinks.

And you can do various sweetnesses, it's great!

Highly recommend Milk Cha Cha.
Great drinks!

I love to go and get boba with my partner. I really like that they have milk alternatives and not just lactose/lactose free milk. It's hard to find places that make boba with alternative milks! Super yummy.
A relaxing atmosphere

This place is amazing, i got the earl grey milk tea regular sweetness with boba pearls and oatmilk instead of regular. Best boba ive had in a while. Btw you can definitely taste the tea. If you like/love tea
best around, brown sugar espresso is delicious & tapioca pearls are very flavorful which was a pleasant surprise
Love this place it’s SOOO GOOD
Good drinks and good service. The shop is very clean and nice.
First time there and it's a cute place, located at Northeast Plaza on Cherry Road.  Owners are sweet.  Good size drink, 22 ounces and many choices.  Nice and refreshing.

My kids really enjoyed their Strawberry Tornado drink.
I wished they had Coconut Milk Tea, but still a pretty good place to drop in for a quick drink.
I am in LOVE! My husband and I found this place and have been faithful patrons ever since!
Very patient and helpful! Great flavors with quick service!
This place is Awesome! Drinks are amazing, staff is so sweet and appreciative of business.
The drinks are good and the people are nice. Got a Taro Slush, it’s so pretty! And there’s lots of ways to customize your drink.
the boba here is so yummy! i’ve tried plenty of places and this is by far one of the best! the owners/workers are so sweet and welcoming. definitely coming back!

Super cute boba place with lots of boba plushies. I wanted to try something new so I ordered the Strawberry matcha latte with bobas and it was good. They have a lot of yummy flavors so I’ll try a new one next time.
Didn’t say hello or greet me but the drink was good
Great Ambiance.

This is my favorite place in Rock Hill! As a Winthrop student I really enjoy the atmosphere and people that work at Milk Cha-cha. I like bringing my friends from school here and grabbing a well hand-crafted milk tea on the go! They have games in their sitting area which are very entertaining if you decide to dine in or just for when you’re waiting. They are very quick and the staff are extremely friendly and welcoming. 100/10

The lady who took our order was super nice. The place was clean and there were some games on the tables for kids. We got the Hong Kong and the Espresso latte with boba. I enjoyed my drink and would recommend this!
very nice place :)
Ordered the Strawberry Matcha Latte, oreo slush, lychee strawberry cha cha and espresso slush. All delicious. Very generous portions. Wonderful service.
Very friendly staff and Chris is just so  nice.
The lychee boba tea was amazing. The coffee latte one too, good product.
We will be back!
Not good

**Update- only semi-negative feedback is that they don't have a customer service policy for if you order something that you really dislike. I understand this, but make sure that you only order a drink that you are confident you will enjoy. It's a bit pricey to throw away most of a drink.

The household teenagers requested Boba.... So I was tasked with locating a place to obtain boba. Milk Cha Cha did not disappoint. The drinks are great and the service is excellent. Definitely a great stop for people being roped into taking teens for boba.
Adorable location and decor. Love the games on the tables and the place was spotless. Owner and employee were super friendly and generous with their time and smiles
Very delicious and peaceful atmosphere
Amazing Drinks
Great drinks
Taro Slush is awesome! Super friendly staff!

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Strawberry Tornado, Strawberry Pocky Sticks Various Mochi Various Jelly Cups and Various Jelly Strips

reviews_data.review_text: Great drinks and the whole group loves them, cute decor and awesome workers
Very cute little shop. Fast service and great staff. Been coming since they opened and every time it’s been good. ☺️🧋

My daughter wanted a Boba Tea Bday party and Milk Cha Cha RH made it happen! Such a welcoming atmosphere, amaaaazing drinks and the service was well above average. We had a group of 12 (girls and mamas together) and drinks were made promptly and perfectly! 10/10 recommend going!!!! Thank you again!
AMAZING SHOP! Great drinks, atmosphere & service!!!!!!!

I come here at least once a week. The staff are wonderful and already know my name and usual order when I walk in. Everything is reasonably priced and I’ve never had anything from here that wasn’t delicious. They also have dairy alternatives so I can still get “milk” teas from here (thank you!). Their teas are always perfectly brewed and never bitter! My go-to is the lychee green tea but also recommend their passionfruit & jasmine teas. 👍 If you like matcha this is the place to go because their matcha latte is the best one I’ve EVER had. I’m glad I don’t have to drive to South Park anymore lol. Please check this place out if you haven’t!
I went here today with my kids. It was great service and great drinks. Will return again! Very happy! Give them a try!
Visited for the first time on my lunch today and it was a great experience. The customer service was amazing. They were helpful and recommended a tasty drink! Would recommend if you’re in Rock Hill.
I love that they have options for diabetics! Everything is wonderful and the service is top knotch!!
Chris was fantastic and super informative about the drink selection. 10/10 service and atmosphere!
Love the mocha!

I had the Brown Sugar Milk Swirl with boba and oatmilk as a milk substitution and it was great! It definitely is something good if you’re looking for something sweet! Our server did an amazing job with the drink and gave great service!
Generally a great place to go if you enjoy Boba Tea.
This place is good. Vibe check. Their tea tasted good. We spend some good time here drinking tea and playing some board games. Well spend time.
Best Bobo in Rock Hill!  Better than Kung Fu Tea!
so yummy
it was great! they were nice and thorough and the places is spotless!! we got the strawberry  yakult, it tasted delicious!
Such a cute place with friendly staff! The drinks are amazing and the staff are very helpful in choosing a flavor
The best boba I’ve ever had! The staff is so friendly and I love the cute decorations. My favorite is the Taro Slush! Would definitely recommend whenever you’re in Rock Hill.
Delicious taro slush and their boba is so good ! Always friendly service and good prices. Thankful to have this as an option around here!
First time at Milk Cha Cha and we love it! So good!
Milk Cha Cha is really cool n yummy :D
This was simply one of the best drinks I have ever had. I had the mango tornado with lychee topping. It hit every spot that I was expecting! Will definitely be back!
Beautiful place,, smells great and service is amazing
Came in for the first time & though we were here 30 minutes before closing, the staff was so sweet. They gave us great recommendations for our first time and the milk teas we so good!
My first time ever here!! I will deff b bk!! I loooved the inside of ur store. And ya'll were super friendly and helpful!! The Jasmine Green Milk Tea was super yummy!!

My family and I stopped by this weekend because we were craving something refreshing and were all so happy with our drinks! They use really fresh ingredients and you can have them customize it how you’d like it. With so many different flavors to try, we’re  definitely going to be back to try them! The shop is clean and decorated so nicely while the staff were all so friendly and helpful with making recommendations as I can sometimes be indecisive. If you're a fan of boba tea and fruit teas, this place is a must-try!
Best boba I’ve ever had!

We love Milk Cha-Cha! We visited for the first time during our Christmas break. The staff was very courteous and helpful explaining the differences in the drinks they provided. The drink we got was the brown sugar boba and it was great. We signed up to be members because we knew we would be returning. Highly recommend!

I’ve had a pleasant experience every time I’ve been here since they’ve opened a few months ago. Customer service is top tier and the boba consistently tastes amazing. Would highly recommend the brown sugar milk swirl!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Josue,
We are sincerely sorry that we disappointed you tonight. We closed today, 1/7/24 at 7pm for our company holiday party. We were proactive and posted on our Instagram and facebook (dated on 12/19/23). We posted 2x’s on our Instagram story today at 10:30am and 11:30am. We also updated our Google hours, DoorDash, and Ubereats. We strive to stay consistent with our hours. Since opening, we have only closed early on Christmas Eve, closed on Christmas Day, and closed an hour early today to treat our team. We stay dedicated to keep things as routine as possible while still trying to keep our team happy. We hope that you understand and give us another try.
reviews_data.review_text:
Boba is really good.
If you are going to change hours you should give a notice on social media. We drove 35 minutes to find out y’all close at 7 when last week we stopped by and daily close time is 8pm.

My son has always wanted to try Boba Tea so we decided to give this place a try. My Tien was at the register and was very kind! She took the time to explain how to order and even let my son sample the boba before we ordered. We ended up getting a brown sugar milk swirl and a strawberry tornado. The brown sugar swirl tastes like sweet milk, and the strawberry swirl tastes like strawberry milk. Very refreshing! Her customer service was AMAZING! I highly recommend this place!
Staff is very friendly, very fast service high-quality ingredients and fair prices
V was amazing. Provided great customer service and excellent menu recommendations
Good atmosphere, great drinks
Very nice staff and helpful with trying this for the first time!
Love  this place !!
obsessed with this place would be an understatement considering i come here at least once a week. staff is always so friendly and drinks are always good. my favorite place for sure!!
Finally, a boba shop in Rock Hill that gets it right! Milk Cha-Cha uses fresh ingredients and you can really taste the difference. The boba was cooked to perfection. I'll definitely be back for more!
An excellent way to end my work day! Staff is friendly and the atmosphere is quite laid back. Quick service, despite a few customers waiting in front of me. Will definitely be back!
The aroma of tea stains the air like molecules in 💕... Lol .. a million thumbs up.
Clean, bright, and brand new location with EXCELLENT customer service and top tier tea!
A super cute boba shop with a variety of milk teas and fruit teas to choose from!! So glad to have one in Rock Hill so we don’t have to drive all the way to Charlotte now

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Strawberry Tornado, Strawberry Milk Swirl, Mocha Latte

reviews_data.review_text: Such a friendly place. Everyone smiles and greets you.

I love this Milk Cha Cha location. It's clean, fresh, and inviting! My go to drink is the Caffe Latte Slush with an oreo and half amount of boba. This version is better and not as heavy compared to Noodle Planet's Oreo Coffee in Alhambra, CA. My hubby loved the Hot Jasmine Tea. These drinks are on the higher side but the ingredients are top quality. The staff are friendly, fast, and efficient. Management has trained them well and I pray to God that their level of service and product will remain high standard. You have a loyal customer now!
Friendly staff, I love their taro slush with boba! Look forward to taking my family here.
Pineapple was very fresh and my wife and my drinks were amazing!

Highly recommended! They have an incredible selection of organic teas and most of their products don't use artificial flavoring! The staff is super friendly and highly efficient! Don't miss out on this wonderful treat of a store!

So glad they opened up this new location! I finally found my drink: cafe slush with oreo/half amount of boba!!!!!!!!!!! IT's a winner! I ordered the teas and milk teas and it was too strong for me, possibly because they use real tea! Service is excellent and pleasant. Highly recommended. They use quality ingredients here.
Love it!! esp. Dont have to drive to charlotte for some good tea!
My teenage sons and I have tried 4 other Boba Tea businesses and this one is our favorite.
Very cute and very good!
Super cute spot! My first time having anything like this. The owner was super nice and helped me pick the best drink for me.
Best boba i’ve had in a long while! Staff was really friendly, and had good recommendations as well 🩷 Will def be frequenting more often
Teas are great and they are more than happy to help
One of the best boba drinks I’ve had 😄 Definitely would recommend!
Such a cute spot! So glad they opened up a location in Rock hill to satisfy my cravings. Definitely try the mango yakult, yum!!!
Great service and even better drinks!!!
Love this place  ! Great service!

I love milk tea! Everytime I drive through Rock Hill, I make a planned stop to get my milk tea fix. Where I reside, the milk teas are not good!! The staff is friendly, the drinks are fresh and flavorful, and the decor is beautiful. Milk ChaCha offers a huge selection of drinks. I cannot wait to try more flavors from this location.
We love Milk Cha Cha in Rock Hill. Every drink that we have tried has been delicious. The staff is extremely kind and even recognizes us now. We visit every week because the tea is just that good.
By far the best boba I’ve had. The staff is great and friendly and it’s so adorable in there.
This new boba place in Rock Hill is super cute and their drinks taste amazing! The staff are super friendly. Highly recommend this place  for your boba cravings!!
I love the fresh strawberry tea there! The bobas were the right consistency and sweetness too. I highly recommend them for bubble tea! I’ll have to try a new flavor next time.

I wanted to try a new bubble tea place and Milk Cha-Cha did not disappoint! They use real fruit instead of powder, which is a plus. The employees were so sweet and recommended really tasty drinks for my fiancé and I. My favorite is the brown sugar milk swirl.
I have had like 5 different drinks from here and they are all so good & refreshing! staff was very kind & quick.
All staff there are very friendly. Quick services and right on point.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Marie,
Thank you for your review. We’re sorry we did not leave you a 5 star impression and we truly apologize for that. We have only been opened for a few weeks and are still training our employees. With our menu being bigger, it will take a little time for them to be able to taste and learn each and every drink. 
At this time, all 4 Milk Cha Cha locations have the same prices. This is a franchise and only corporate has control over pricing. Milk Cha Cha  prices are slightly elevated compared to other tea brands due to our choice to use only the best premium products and fresh fruits. We also brew fresh tea every day and choose not to recycle our tea because the franchise believes our customers deserve the best freshness and quality. We hope that you would give us another chance. 
Regards,
Milk Cha Cha team
reviews_data.review_text: The price isn't ideal. Asked for recommendations and tea options, employee couldn't answer any questions. Really disappointed in this location after many visits to the NC locations.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the awesome review and we appreciate your support.  Thank you for the kind words.
reviews_data.review_text: Love this place!!! So glad they decided to open a store in rock hill!!! Everyone is so nice and patient and they do everything they can to get your order just right. Highly recommend for any boba lover or someone who wants to try something new.

So happy we have a Milk Cha Cha in Rock hill! It’s delicious and the staff is incredible! I struggled to order the first time and one of them explained everything to me and gave me wonderful recommendations!! My friends and I each got something different and all of them were so good!  I can’t give them enough stars!!!
I’ve tried Milk Cha Cha multiple time and  every time it’s so delicious! The employees are the best!! Definitely recommend!
Cutest atmosphere, sweetest staff, and DELICIOUS drinks. I especially love the Strawberry Tornado with 50% sweetness, the Mocha Slush, and the Chunky Pineapple Tea. Sooo good! 😋

The atmosphere of the place is amazing! I have been twice once before they had their grand opening and once after and both times I have loved the experience! The boba taste amazing and it’s not expensive for such a great taste. I’m on a mission to collect all the hearts I can off the cups. I would definitely recommend this place!
The best milk tea / boba shop in town! I’ve had a variety of drinks since they’ve opened, all so good! You can adjust the level of ice, sweetness, and add toppings to your drinks. Highly recommend!!
I have tried it out many times all of the drinks have been amazing! Very cute shop and sweet staff.

I am a boba tea lover and was so happy when this spot opened up! My two favorite drinks are the Tara slush with boba and Oreo as well as the Brown sugar milk swirl with boba ! The tea and the atmosphere is so cute ! Everyone there is so sweet too . Love coming here for my boba tea fix ! Thank you milk cha cha in rockhill !
Great service and tea flavors were the best!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the awesome review and we appreciate your support.

reviews_data.review_text: Good but a lot of boba pearls

My local boba place closed so I went here on a whim and had a great experience. The staff was friendly, our drinks were made quickly, and the boba was still warm. Going to be my go-to boba spot from now on.

I had the pleasure of trying milk cha-cha today their customer service was excellent !! I love that  they make their Thai tea with real tea leaves! I ordered an iced thai tea with brown sugar boba and a milk foam topping it was a 10/10✨

Female Employee who frequently visits Virginia had an attitude & was extremely rude. there was plenty of customers and it disgusted her to give me the bathroom key up until point of purchase. Additionally Items fell off the display shelf & the first person she looked at was me. I wonder Why ! The kids standing directly next to the display shelf knocked it over. Giving my order was an issue & I ordered one item. This is the same item that I order all the time & it was not made correctly. I am a frequent customer & usually the guys give good service. Great service is important especially with the price of their beverages. What I also found distasteful is that she compared Milk Cha-Cha to Starbucks which is not a good look. All I ask going forward is for good service and appreciate your customers, especially the ones who are regulars.

Wonderful experience! Employees and owner are very kind, helpful, and efficient. My drink was made very quickly, and it was absolutely delicious. Definitely worth the price, and cheaper than I usually pay!
First time trying the boba tea, Love it! Tastes, yummy, organic and fresh. The workers were very welcoming and kind, Highly recommended 10/10 !
I come here every Sunday with my boyfriend. We love it!

am so glad I stopped by Milk Cha-cha! It is definitely the best spot for boba/bubble tea in Rock Hill. I ordered the mango boba tea and it was perfect—the sweetness level was just right and the boba pearls were perfectly chewy. The staff was friendly and the shop has a great vibe. Highly recommended.
I got a strawberry matcha and it was delicious
Very good and very clean! Love the staff every time I'm there <3
Best Boba Tea in Rock Hill.
Delicious boba everyime! Took my daughter here for a special treat on her birthday because she loves it so much!
Great boba!
Awesome strawberry matcha latte!! Great customer service! I will go back again!
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️We’ve been coming here for months! It’s our absolute favorite, and everything is always fresh and freshly made! 10 stars! Highly recommend!

First the atmosphere. You can't beat a greeting from genuinely friendly people. They never seemed to tire from my endless questions. Always patient they never missed on their suggestions. The drinks here look like art work and I've tried many. While I probably wouldn't order some again there was never an issue with quality. They have plenty of teas I could endorse no problem.  Drink the Vietnamese coffee of you want to ditch a certain coffe shop. I make the excuse of bringing my son so I can go twice a day sometimes. I'm so glad they are here to offer something different and delicious. Do yourself a favor and give them a try. If you're not sure what to order they are more than happy to help. I would give 100 stars if possible!!!!

I recently visited this boba shop from out of town and was blown away by how consistent it was. I personally loved their HK milk tea, but if you’re into fruit teas, classic milk teas, there’s something for everyone. They also have options for how sweet you like your drinks. What really sets this place apart is their amazing boba - it was perfectly chewy and surprisingly fresh. Overall, it’s definitely worth a stop if you’re in the area. You can tell they take great pride in their drinks, and the flavor and quality are top notch!

Really good! I always go here for boba. It's my favorite in the Charlotte area. Really tasty, good price especially compared to something like Starbucks. Friendly staff and really clean inside.they also have a good loyalty reward system.
boba is good with good selection
Very cozy and delicious I do recommend. The shop is small but it adds to the vibe. Very fast service and plenty of seating. The employees are very kind and have a very large selection of drinks.
I was so happy to discover Milk Cha Cha as a local place to get Boba tea. The Brown Sugar Mill Swirl is to die for! I highly recommend checking them out.
Love
The darjeeling milk tea, is my usual go to, when I need a caffeine kick, but the new café latte feel more appropriate now that it's fall.
The Thai tea has been amazing every time I’ve visited, strawberry yakult was nice and refreshing as well. Staff is friendly and inviting and the store was very clean.
I’ve been coming here for about 2 years and I still can’t get enough of the drinks! I recommend this place to everyone!!
This drink is so fire 🔥
Hands-down the best boba place I’ve ever been to! Service is wonderful. Drinks are amazing! They’re always so kind to answer all my questions and the drinks never disappoint!
Our favorite place for a boba!!
Kevin was super friendly and helpful. I had never had Boba before and the drink I got was amazing! I will definitely be back!
I love thisszz

I love love LOVE this place.  There aren’t a lot of Boba tea places near me, and there’s even fewer that have rose milk tea. They have rose milk tea! It is my absolute favorite. The people there are very kind and I’ve never had a bad experience. This is my go to for my milk tea.
I love going to this place they are very friendly and the drinks are amazing I just love it and recommend it

DON’T FORGET YOUR TYPE OF MILK!!! I loved this place and visit when I’m in the area b/c I don’t live close. Today I forgot to mention I prefer almond milk b/c the girl asked regular sweetness, ice, and everything okay. (NOTHING ABOUT MILK OPTIONS!) I didn’t think about the milk portion and I prefer Almond Milk. They would not change my drink and told me I could pay for another one.  So disappointing!!! Tried to give it to hubby, he didn’t like it so my drink ended in the trash :(
The absolute best tea ever!
Delicious boba and drinks with great workers!
So glad that Milk Cha-Cha is in Rock Hill. Absolutely the best Boba tea place I've been to. The staff is always friendly and quick.
Love love loveee this place 💯 they always treat me and my friends right 🙂‍↕️ the mango with strawberry popping boba is my go to but everything I've had here has been sooooo yummy
I love this place! I've been coming about once a week since they opened and I've never had a bad experience. Drinks are always great and so are the workers :)

I tried other milk teas before, never satisfied my taste. I found milk cha cha. I've been going to milk cha cha at least 2 times a week. I can't never decide which flavor, so I get different flavors each time. Their brown sugar Bubba is always soft. I highly recommend milk cha cha.
YUMMMMM!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi TPT,
Thank you for taking the time to leave us a review. After reviewing our cameras, our admins verified that the situation was handled in line with our policies. You ordered a Hong Kong milk tea with no sugar and no ice. Our recipe remains the same for every order; the only adjustments in your case were the sugar and ice levels you selected. Because we brew with real, authentic tea leaves, the flavor can taste naturally more bitter without sugar or ice.
Our team offered to add those items back in, but you declined and instead requested a different drink. As noted at the bottom of our menu, all sales are final. This policy helps us keep prices fair and consistent, especially as a small business navigating today’s economy. If we were to remake drinks freely, we would unfortunately need to increase our prices for everyone.
We understand our policies may not match every expectation, and we’re sorry this experience didn’t meet yours. We truly appreciate your feedback and hope you’ll give us another chance in the future.
reviews_data.review_text: Once my favorite place for milk tea but all it took was one bad customer service experience - the tea was wayyy bitter but they were unwilling to change it! I can tell even from the color - it’s way too dark compared to the normal one and compared to their own advertised picture or the drink! Bad order can happened once in a while but bad customer service is inexcusable!! It could have been easily re-made instead of ‘we don’t do that here’

Best Boba 🧋 in town! Rock Hill needed this! Chris and Ashley get our order right every time and service is top notch! Our favorite drinks are Hong Kong milk tea add pudding, Jazmine green milk tea, and brown sugar milk swirl!
𝙸𝚝'𝚜 𝚜𝚘𝚘 𝚐𝚘𝚘𝚍 𝙸 𝚍𝚎𝚏𝚒𝚗𝚒𝚝𝚎𝚕𝚢 𝚛𝚎𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚖𝚎𝚗𝚍
No words to describe it’s amazing! So very nice and so cute and so yummy😋%100 recommend.

El sabor de té thai con boba es muy delicioso.
Primera vez que voy a este lugar y quede muy satisfecha. Excelente lugar y atención. Han ganado un cliente más.

So yummy!! I’ve been here a few times and try something different each time, and every time it’s so good! This time I got an Ube Milk Tea with boba (75% sweet) and it was perfect! Thank you Milk Cha Cha!

Amazing boba place, great spot to take your lovely girl/boyfriend

Comfy cozy vibe with a good atmosphere and great smell

Oreo slush is amazing, basically tastes like an Oreo but liquid, if you like oreos you'll like this

Brown sugar tastes exceptional and rich, boba is cooked and easy to chew, amazing

Girlfriend loved the signature milk tea, took a tip myself and it was amazing, definitely one of the better milk teas ive had

Come and have a great drink and a good chat with your date, would recommend
-Kevin/Chloe 10/10 7/16/2025
The kids and I all love their teas, slushes, and lattes! friendly staff, great prices, excellent variety!
Love the place. Great boba

Chris the chaiser was rude and felt very rushed to order my children's drinks. One of my girls accidentally dropped her purchased jelly stick and he was like I can't do anything about that and turned his back on us. He could've offered half off on another purchase or something. Terrible customer service!

I appreciate the actual accuracy of sweetness percentages. Most boba places aren't sincere with the sugar levels but this location does. When I'm ask for 25% it actually taste right. This is important for insulin sensitive customers. Not all the drinks can be modified but many of them are.
Come and try their drink ❤️
So good!! 10/10 😋😋very yummy!!
Went with my son. I got the Strawberry tea and he had the Thai tea. Wish I had thought to get pictures. They were both delicious!!!

Amazing drinks! Had some drinks I was looking for that other boba places didn't have, like the strawberry Macha Latte. The staff were so friendly and were happy to give their advice on what drinks I may like!
The customer service was wonderful and one of the people at the register was very helpful for my first time there on what I try! Great selection of drinks and lovely atmosphere.
Best boba tea in town. My daughter's favorite place for a treat.
This place is amazing and I love their boba. It's so good!

My new favorite milk tea spot. I had the brown sugar milk tea which is my favorite and they did not disappoint. It was so yummy. I usually have to drive out to Pineville, NC or take the opportunity while I'm out there for something else to enjoy this tea but now I no longer have to take that long drive or wait to enjoy my favorite drink.
sooooo yummy
Super good place! The lady who work there is super sweet!

I order a drink tasted disgusting wanted to see if they got any other flavors but they said they don’t do NO REFUND nor REMAKE ANY DRINK and that I would have to pay for another drink OUT OF POCKET if I want another one worse boba place
Recommended place, friendly and super fast people and the Oreo slush is delicious. 🥰
Impeccable service. Money well spent. The menu is amazing.
This place have the best boba and it tastes good
Great place
Some of the best boba I've ever had, I can't stop coming back
Amazing.  Bigger sizes and lower prices than other places.  But it is also better tasting

Love Milk Cha Cha! So glad they opened up a new location right near home instead of driving all the way to Charlotte. It’s at a great location located in the plaza with ample parking for the whole family.

You can’t go wrong getting anything here so much so I usually just let the bobarista pick out whatever they recommend and we are always satisfied with my drinks. Definitely try them out. They have plenty of selections from fruity teas to creamy milk teas. They have tons of toppings like fruit jellies, popping boba and regular boba for you to customize everything to your liking.

The service is always so quick and nice! I barely sit down and the drinks are done. So amazing!

The interior is so clean and always organized. It’s the perfect place to sit, relax, and chat while enjoying a sweet treat. I love bringing friends and family here.
Very good and fast service, the boba tea tasted amazing! I loved that there were games available for guests to play while enjoying their drinks, beautiful place I look forward to visiting often!
If you like citrus you will love the grapefruit refresher my recommendation for citrus lovers is the fresh grapefruit yakult 25 or more sweetness it’s amazing
My favorite Bobba place!!!

I had the brown sugar milk swirl and it was delicious! The owners were so kind and pleasant. We are just visiting the area from Ohio for a short New Year's trip, but we will have to come back here-it's that good! Happy 2025 everyone! 🥳
This cute little boba shop's tea is very authentic. The tapioca was nice and fresh and the lady that took our order was so kind. Highly recommend!!
Very good service and kind workers👍
Great place and amazing drinks. Large selection of drinks.  Probiotic drinks and super Healthy and delicious.
Very friendly atmosphere, reasonably priced drinks, and the owners were very nice. First time trying their boba was by chance as I was running errands, 10/10
Such a cute boba tea spot with the nicest owners. They insisted on spelling our names correctly. So good and so fast

They have lots of DF dairy free options.

You can do hot or cold drinks.

And you can do various sweetnesses, it's great!

Highly recommend Milk Cha Cha.
Great drinks!

I love to go and get boba with my partner. I really like that they have milk alternatives and not just lactose/lactose free milk. It's hard to find places that make boba with alternative milks! Super yummy.
A relaxing atmosphere

This place is amazing, i got the earl grey milk tea regular sweetness with boba pearls and oatmilk instead of regular. Best boba ive had in a while. Btw you can definitely taste the tea. If you like/love tea
best around, brown sugar espresso is delicious & tapioca pearls are very flavorful which was a pleasant surprise
Love this place it’s SOOO GOOD
Good drinks and good service. The shop is very clean and nice.
First time there and it's a cute place, located at Northeast Plaza on Cherry Road.  Owners are sweet.  Good size drink, 22 ounces and many choices.  Nice and refreshing.

My kids really enjoyed their Strawberry Tornado drink.
I wished they had Coconut Milk Tea, but still a pretty good place to drop in for a quick drink.
I am in LOVE! My husband and I found this place and have been faithful patrons ever since!
Very patient and helpful! Great flavors with quick service!
This place is Awesome! Drinks are amazing, staff is so sweet and appreciative of business.
The drinks are good and the people are nice. Got a Taro Slush, it’s so pretty! And there’s lots of ways to customize your drink.
the boba here is so yummy! i’ve tried plenty of places and this is by far one of the best! the owners/workers are so sweet and welcoming. definitely coming back!

Super cute boba place with lots of boba plushies. I wanted to try something new so I ordered the Strawberry matcha latte with bobas and it was good. They have a lot of yummy flavors so I’ll try a new one next time.
Didn’t say hello or greet me but the drink was good
Great Ambiance.

This is my favorite place in Rock Hill! As a Winthrop student I really enjoy the atmosphere and people that work at Milk Cha-cha. I like bringing my friends from school here and grabbing a well hand-crafted milk tea on the go! They have games in their sitting area which are very entertaining if you decide to dine in or just for when you’re waiting. They are very quick and the staff are extremely friendly and welcoming. 100/10

The lady who took our order was super nice. The place was clean and there were some games on the tables for kids. We got the Hong Kong and the Espresso latte with boba. I enjoyed my drink and would recommend this!
very nice place :)
Ordered the Strawberry Matcha Latte, oreo slush, lychee strawberry cha cha and espresso slush. All delicious. Very generous portions. Wonderful service.
Very friendly staff and Chris is just so  nice.
The lychee boba tea was amazing. The coffee latte one too, good product.
We will be back!
Not good

**Update- only semi-negative feedback is that they don't have a customer service policy for if you order something that you really dislike. I understand this, but make sure that you only order a drink that you are confident you will enjoy. It's a bit pricey to throw away most of a drink.

The household teenagers requested Boba.... So I was tasked with locating a place to obtain boba. Milk Cha Cha did not disappoint. The drinks are great and the service is excellent. Definitely a great stop for people being roped into taking teens for boba.
Adorable location and decor. Love the games on the tables and the place was spotless. Owner and employee were super friendly and generous with their time and smiles
Very delicious and peaceful atmosphere
Amazing Drinks

Taro Slush is awesome! Super friendly staff!

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Strawberry Tornado, Strawberry Pocky Sticks Various Mochi Various Jelly Cups and Various Jelly Strips

reviews_data.review_text: Great drinks and the whole group loves them, cute decor and awesome workers
Very cute little shop. Fast service and great staff. Been coming since they opened and every time it’s been good. ☺️🧋

My daughter wanted a Boba Tea Bday party and Milk Cha Cha RH made it happen! Such a welcoming atmosphere, amaaaazing drinks and the service was well above average. We had a group of 12 (girls and mamas together) and drinks were made promptly and perfectly! 10/10 recommend going!!!! Thank you again!
AMAZING SHOP! Great drinks, atmosphere & service!!!!!!!

I come here at least once a week. The staff are wonderful and already know my name and usual order when I walk in. Everything is reasonably priced and I’ve never had anything from here that wasn’t delicious. They also have dairy alternatives so I can still get “milk” teas from here (thank you!). Their teas are always perfectly brewed and never bitter! My go-to is the lychee green tea but also recommend their passionfruit & jasmine teas. 👍 If you like matcha this is the place to go because their matcha latte is the best one I’ve EVER had. I’m glad I don’t have to drive to South Park anymore lol. Please check this place out if you haven’t!
I went here today with my kids. It was great service and great drinks. Will return again! Very happy! Give them a try!
Visited for the first time on my lunch today and it was a great experience. The customer service was amazing. They were helpful and recommended a tasty drink! Would recommend if you’re in Rock Hill.
I love that they have options for diabetics! Everything is wonderful and the service is top knotch!!
Chris was fantastic and super informative about the drink selection. 10/10 service and atmosphere!
Love the mocha!

I had the Brown Sugar Milk Swirl with boba and oatmilk as a milk substitution and it was great! It definitely is something good if you’re looking for something sweet! Our server did an amazing job with the drink and gave great service!
Generally a great place to go if you enjoy Boba Tea.
This place is good. Vibe check. Their tea tasted good. We spend some good time here drinking tea and playing some board games. Well spend time.
Best Bobo in Rock Hill!  Better than Kung Fu Tea!
so yummy
it was great! they were nice and thorough and the places is spotless!! we got the strawberry  yakult, it tasted delicious!
Such a cute place with friendly staff! The drinks are amazing and the staff are very helpful in choosing a flavor
The best boba I’ve ever had! The staff is so friendly and I love the cute decorations. My favorite is the Taro Slush! Would definitely recommend whenever you’re in Rock Hill.
Delicious taro slush and their boba is so good ! Always friendly service and good prices. Thankful to have this as an option around here!
First time at Milk Cha Cha and we love it! So good!
Milk Cha Cha is really cool n yummy :D
This was simply one of the best drinks I have ever had. I had the mango tornado with lychee topping. It hit every spot that I was expecting! Will definitely be back!
Beautiful place,, smells great and service is amazing
Came in for the first time & though we were here 30 minutes before closing, the staff was so sweet. They gave us great recommendations for our first time and the milk teas we so good!
My first time ever here!! I will deff b bk!! I loooved the inside of ur store. And ya'll were super friendly and helpful!! The Jasmine Green Milk Tea was super yummy!!

My family and I stopped by this weekend because we were craving something refreshing and were all so happy with our drinks! They use really fresh ingredients and you can have them customize it how you’d like it. With so many different flavors to try, we’re  definitely going to be back to try them! The shop is clean and decorated so nicely while the staff were all so friendly and helpful with making recommendations as I can sometimes be indecisive. If you're a fan of boba tea and fruit teas, this place is a must-try!
Best boba I’ve ever had!

We love Milk Cha-Cha! We visited for the first time during our Christmas break. The staff was very courteous and helpful explaining the differences in the drinks they provided. The drink we got was the brown sugar boba and it was great. We signed up to be members because we knew we would be returning. Highly recommend!

I’ve had a pleasant experience every time I’ve been here since they’ve opened a few months ago. Customer service is top tier and the boba consistently tastes amazing. Would highly recommend the brown sugar milk swirl!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Josue,
We are sincerely sorry that we disappointed you tonight. We closed today, 1/7/24 at 7pm for our company holiday party. We were proactive and posted on our Instagram and facebook (dated on 12/19/23). We posted 2x’s on our Instagram story today at 10:30am and 11:30am. We also updated our Google hours, DoorDash, and Ubereats. We strive to stay consistent with our hours. Since opening, we have only closed early on Christmas Eve, closed on Christmas Day, and closed an hour early today to treat our team. We stay dedicated to keep things as routine as possible while still trying to keep our team happy. We hope that you understand and give us another try.
reviews_data.review_text:
Boba is really good.
If you are going to change hours you should give a notice on social media. We drove 35 minutes to find out y’all close at 7 when last week we stopped by and daily close time is 8pm.

My son has always wanted to try Boba Tea so we decided to give this place a try. My Tien was at the register and was very kind! She took the time to explain how to order and even let my son sample the boba before we ordered. We ended up getting a brown sugar milk swirl and a strawberry tornado. The brown sugar swirl tastes like sweet milk, and the strawberry swirl tastes like strawberry milk. Very refreshing! Her customer service was AMAZING! I highly recommend this place!
Staff is very friendly, very fast service high-quality ingredients and fair prices
V was amazing. Provided great customer service and excellent menu recommendations
Good atmosphere, great drinks
Very nice staff and helpful with trying this for the first time!
Love  this place !!
obsessed with this place would be an understatement considering i come here at least once a week. staff is always so friendly and drinks are always good. my favorite place for sure!!
Finally, a boba shop in Rock Hill that gets it right! Milk Cha-Cha uses fresh ingredients and you can really taste the difference. The boba was cooked to perfection. I'll definitely be back for more!
An excellent way to end my work day! Staff is friendly and the atmosphere is quite laid back. Quick service, despite a few customers waiting in front of me. Will definitely be back!
The aroma of tea stains the air like molecules in 💕... Lol .. a million thumbs up.
Clean, bright, and brand new location with EXCELLENT customer service and top tier tea!
A super cute boba shop with a variety of milk teas and fruit teas to choose from!! So glad to have one in Rock Hill so we don’t have to drive all the way to Charlotte now

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Strawberry Tornado, Strawberry Milk Swirl, Mocha Latte

reviews_data.review_text: Such a friendly place. Everyone smiles and greets you.

I love this Milk Cha Cha location. It's clean, fresh, and inviting! My go to drink is the Caffe Latte Slush with an oreo and half amount of boba. This version is better and not as heavy compared to Noodle Planet's Oreo Coffee in Alhambra, CA. My hubby loved the Hot Jasmine Tea. These drinks are on the higher side but the ingredients are top quality. The staff are friendly, fast, and efficient. Management has trained them well and I pray to God that their level of service and product will remain high standard. You have a loyal customer now!
Friendly staff, I love their taro slush with boba! Look forward to taking my family here.
Pineapple was very fresh and my wife and my drinks were amazing!

Highly recommended! They have an incredible selection of organic teas and most of their products don't use artificial flavoring! The staff is super friendly and highly efficient! Don't miss out on this wonderful treat of a store!

So glad they opened up this new location! I finally found my drink: cafe slush with oreo/half amount of boba!!!!!!!!!!! IT's a winner! I ordered the teas and milk teas and it was too strong for me, possibly because they use real tea! Service is excellent and pleasant. Highly recommended. They use quality ingredients here.
Love it!! esp. Dont have to drive to charlotte for some good tea!
My teenage sons and I have tried 4 other Boba Tea businesses and this one is our favorite.
Very cute and very good!
Super cute spot! My first time having anything like this. The owner was super nice and helped me pick the best drink for me.
Best boba i’ve had in a long while! Staff was really friendly, and had good recommendations as well 🩷 Will def be frequenting more often
Teas are great and they are more than happy to help
One of the best boba drinks I’ve had 😄 Definitely would recommend!
Such a cute spot! So glad they opened up a location in Rock hill to satisfy my cravings. Definitely try the mango yakult, yum!!!
Great service and even better drinks!!!
Love this place  ! Great service!

I love milk tea! Everytime I drive through Rock Hill, I make a planned stop to get my milk tea fix. Where I reside, the milk teas are not good!! The staff is friendly, the drinks are fresh and flavorful, and the decor is beautiful. Milk ChaCha offers a huge selection of drinks. I cannot wait to try more flavors from this location.
We love Milk Cha Cha in Rock Hill. Every drink that we have tried has been delicious. The staff is extremely kind and even recognizes us now. We visit every week because the tea is just that good.
By far the best boba I’ve had. The staff is great and friendly and it’s so adorable in there.
This new boba place in Rock Hill is super cute and their drinks taste amazing! The staff are super friendly. Highly recommend this place  for your boba cravings!!
I love the fresh strawberry tea there! The bobas were the right consistency and sweetness too. I highly recommend them for bubble tea! I’ll have to try a new flavor next time.

I wanted to try a new bubble tea place and Milk Cha-Cha did not disappoint! They use real fruit instead of powder, which is a plus. The employees were so sweet and recommended really tasty drinks for my fiancé and I. My favorite is the brown sugar milk swirl.
I have had like 5 different drinks from here and they are all so good & refreshing! staff was very kind & quick.
All staff there are very friendly. Quick services and right on point.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Marie,
Thank you for your review. We’re sorry we did not leave you a 5 star impression and we truly apologize for that. We have only been opened for a few weeks and are still training our employees. With our menu being bigger, it will take a little time for them to be able to taste and learn each and every drink. 
At this time, all 4 Milk Cha Cha locations have the same prices. This is a franchise and only corporate has control over pricing. Milk Cha Cha  prices are slightly elevated compared to other tea brands due to our choice to use only the best premium products and fresh fruits. We also brew fresh tea every day and choose not to recycle our tea because the franchise believes our customers deserve the best freshness and quality. We hope that you would give us another chance. 
Regards,
Milk Cha Cha team
reviews_data.review_text: The price isn't ideal. Asked for recommendations and tea options, employee couldn't answer any questions. Really disappointed in this location after many visits to the NC locations.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the awesome review and we appreciate your support.  Thank you for the kind words.
reviews_data.review_text: Love this place!!! So glad they decided to open a store in rock hill!!! Everyone is so nice and patient and they do everything they can to get your order just right. Highly recommend for any boba lover or someone who wants to try something new.

So happy we have a Milk Cha Cha in Rock hill! It’s delicious and the staff is incredible! I struggled to order the first time and one of them explained everything to me and gave me wonderful recommendations!! My friends and I each got something different and all of them were so good!  I can’t give them enough stars!!!
I’ve tried Milk Cha Cha multiple time and  every time it’s so delicious! The employees are the best!! Definitely recommend!
Cutest atmosphere, sweetest staff, and DELICIOUS drinks. I especially love the Strawberry Tornado with 50% sweetness, the Mocha Slush, and the Chunky Pineapple Tea. Sooo good! 😋

The atmosphere of the place is amazing! I have been twice once before they had their grand opening and once after and both times I have loved the experience! The boba taste amazing and it’s not expensive for such a great taste. I’m on a mission to collect all the hearts I can off the cups. I would definitely recommend this place!
The best milk tea / boba shop in town! I’ve had a variety of drinks since they’ve opened, all so good! You can adjust the level of ice, sweetness, and add toppings to your drinks. Highly recommend!!
I have tried it out many times all of the drinks have been amazing! Very cute shop and sweet staff.

I am a boba tea lover and was so happy when this spot opened up! My two favorite drinks are the Tara slush with boba and Oreo as well as the Brown sugar milk swirl with boba ! The tea and the atmosphere is so cute ! Everyone there is so sweet too . Love coming here for my boba tea fix ! Thank you milk cha cha in rockhill !
Great service and tea flavors were the best!

reviews_data.review_text: This was my first time coming here and I will definitely be back!! Their portions are very generous, I got a lot of tea and a ton of toppings- and they are very well priced. I pay a lot more at other boba places for a lot less product! The boba was super fresh and delicious, as was the lychee jelly. The customer service was amazing as well, I didn’t catch her name, but the older lady who took my order was very sweet. And the tiny heart topper on the cup just made my day! All around a gem for Rock Hill to have.
